commit.message:
Add friend challenge system

Backend:
- challenges table (challenge_id, challenger_username, scene_id, score_to_beat)
- POST /api/challenge — creates a challenge link, returns short hex ID + URL
- GET /api/challenge/{id} — returns challenge details (public, no auth)
- GET /challenge/{id} — SPA route: serves index.html so JS handles routing

Frontend:
- URL routing in boot: detects /challenge/[id] path, loads challenge screen
- #challengeScreen — full-page challenge card showing challenger, score, movie
- "Accept Challenge" button opens scene modal with challengeCtx set
- After scoring: showChallengeResult() shows YOU WON / So close overlay
- "⚔ Challenge a Friend" button in score panel → POST to create challenge
- Share panel: copy link + WhatsApp share button
- Login/register from challenge page flows back into challenge after auth

commit.message:
perf(filter): replace Vec<Regex> with RegexSet for O(1) wildcard matching

Previously, each DNS query scanned all wildcard patterns sequentially
(O(n_patterns) per query). With 368 wildcard rules from a typical
subscription list, this was ~368 regex matches per query.

Switch to regex::RegexSet which compiles all patterns into a single
automaton, reducing wildcard matching to O(query_len) regardless of
pattern count.

Changes:
- RuleSet: Vec<Regex> → Vec<String> patterns + Option<RegexSet>
- Add RuleSet::build() to compile RegexSet after all rules are loaded
- FilterEngine::reload() and add_rule_live() call build() before store
- parse_adguard_wildcard_domain → parse_adguard_wildcard_pattern (returns String)
- Update wildcard tests to call rs.build() before assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Hard links via New-Item -ItemType HardLink need no elevation and
are semantically equivalent for single-file exe placement.

cold-start flow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use flat /tmp cache mount paths to avoid buildah permission bug

Buildah creates intermediate parent directories for cache mount
destinations with root:root 700, making nested paths like
/tmp/build-cache/pixi inaccessible to non-root users. Use flat
/tmp/<tool>-cache paths that mount directly under /tmp (mode 1777).

- Re-enable pixi/rattler cache mounts in build stages (/tmp/pixi-cache,
  /tmp/rattler-cache) with ENV overrides
- Add npm cache mount to npm build stages (/tmp/npm-cache)
- Move cargo cache from $HOME/.cargo/registry to /tmp/cargo-cache
- Move npm cache from $HOME/.cache/npm to /tmp/npm-cache

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: prevent double fetchClientsFromAPI call on CRM load

Remove unconditional setTimeout(syncFromAPI, 500) that ran in parallel
with auth-triggered syncFromAPI, causing duplicate GET /api/clients.
Now syncFromAPI is called exactly once: from the auth restore path
(with or without token re-fetch) or from fresh login.

feat: Add Agent Awareness Score (AAS) backend

Add AAS as the primary scoring metric replacing SFI-v3.

Schema: AgentExecution, ToolExtraction, ExpertEvaluation, AasScore
models with indexes and Project relations.

Services: aasConstants (25 categories, weights, thresholds),
aasService (geometric mean computation, per-model awareness),
aasBootstrapService (map AIRating awareness to AAS 0-100),
aasLeaderboardService (category/tool/hidden gem leaderboards).

Routes: 11 endpoints at /api/aas — leaderboard, tool detail,
per-model breakdown, hidden gems, categories, version, compute,
record executions, expert evaluations.

Bootstrap script: seeds AAS from existing AI ratings at low confidence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add core library implementation (src/, examples/, setup.py)

This commit adds the complete HAROC library implementation that
reviewers can examine and use to reproduce results.

Core modules (src/):
==================
- regressor.py (260 lines)
  * StateCostateDynamics: Base class for state-costate systems
  * LinearQuadraticSystem: LQ systems with optimal control u* = -R^{-1}B'λ
  * HamiltonianRegressor: HAM forward simulator with RK45 integration
  * Cost functional evaluation

- solver.py (190 lines)
  * ShootingSolver: Single-shooting BVP solver
  * AdaptiveShootingSolver: Multi-guess shooting with retry logic
  * solve_lqr_bvp(): Convenience function for LQR problems
  * Residual computation and root finding (scipy.optimize.root)

- __init__.py: Package initialization with clean API

Examples (examples/):
====================
- example_double_integrator.py: Complete usage example
  * Shows how to solve a 2nd-order LQR problem
  * Generates plots of optimal trajectory/control
  * Demonstrates the library API

Installation:
============
- setup.py: Standard setuptools installation
- requirements.txt: Minimal dependencies (numpy, scipy, matplotlib)
- README.md: Complete documentation with:
  * Quick start guide
  * API reference
  * Examples
  * Link to experiments/
  * Citation info

Repository structure now complete:
- src/: Core library (reviewers can inspect algorithms)
- examples/: Simple usage demonstrations
- experiments/: Paper results (contracts 1-6)

A reviewer can now:
1. pip install -e . (install the library)
2. python examples/example_double_integrator.py (run an example)
3. cd experiments/contract_2 && python exp1_2nd_order.py (reproduce paper results)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: HAROC-Homotopy-Algebraic-Regressors-for-Optimal-Control
repository.description: Non-iterative semi-analytical solvers for nonlinear ODE systems and finite-horizon optimal control, designed for real-time embedded deployment.

commit.message:
Initial release: persistent memory for AI coding assistants

Three layers:
- Memory system: L1/L2/L3 cache, corrections, PTL task tracking
- Dignity Net: ethical guardrails (Genevieve Prentice)
- Triad Protocol: quality gates (Bruce Stephenson + Robin Macomber)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Harden scripts, remove dead code, deduplicate helpers

Phase 1 - Critical & high-priority fixes:
- Prevent shell lockout: exec arasul → arasul || true
- Fix SSH PAM: UsePAM yes (preserves ulimits)
- Prevent data loss: remove --volumes from docker prune
- Fix shell injection: run_as_user uses $1, sed delimiter sanitized
- Fix exit code capture in setup.sh orchestrator
- Dynamic network interface detection (no hardcoded eth0)
- NVMe health cron uses $NVME_DEVICE variable
- Idempotent config file handling across scripts
- Relax ptrace_scope to 1 for dev server debugging

Phase 2 - Dead code removal:
- Remove 11 unused functions (archive/unarchive, gpu_usage,
  print_project_menu/screen, docker_disk_usage, complete())
- Remove 6 orphaned tests, fix @staticmethod indentation

Phase 3 - Deduplication:
- Extract parse_gh_account() helper replacing 4 inline copies
- Unify project_list() removing duplicate _project_names()
- Clean up unused imports from registry.py

Phase 4 - Docs & polish:
- Add /tailscale to /help output and CLAUDE.md
- Update command count (21), categories (8), modules (9)
- Fix .bashrc chmod 0o600 → 0o644

111 tests passing, ruff clean, shellcheck clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: openclaw alignment + entropy reduction

- openclaw: remove Traefik labels (gateway binds loopback 127.0.0.1:18789
  by design; Traefik routing would fail + security anti-pattern)
  Access via: ssh -L 18789:localhost:18789 ariffazil@<tailscale-ip>
- openclaw: fix volume /root/.openclaw→/home/node/.openclaw (runs as node uid 1000)
- openclaw: image openclaw:local→ghcr.io/openclaw/openclaw:latest
- openclaw: port 3000→18789 in all OPENCLAW_URL refs
- compose: remove duplicate postgres_core + redis_broker service definitions
  (managed by docker-compose.phase1.yml as arifos-postgres/arifos-redis)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(ai): overhaul copy engine — LinkedIn algorithm-aligned prompts + 11-check validator

Phase 1 of content quality improvements based on LinkedIn profile analysis
(130 posts) + Feed-SR/360Brew algorithm research:

- generate-copy: author profile injection, diversified variants (Revelacion/
  Terreno/Framework), evidence-backed hook formulas, anti-bot format rules,
  1500-2200 char target, max 2 emojis, no emoji-first hooks
- critic-copy: new categories (anti_bot, baja_guardabilidad, sin_diversificacion,
  hook_bot), updated D/G/P/I rubric aligned to dwell/saves/comments signals
- iterate: variant-specific instructions with author profile context
- RecipeValidator: 11 checks (was 8) — added hook anti-bot, emoji moderation,
  guardability detector, tighter paragraph/length rules
- Variant display names: Revelacion, Terreno, Framework (DB enums unchanged)
- Auto-blindaje: Tailwind DEFAULT learning (#27)

commit.message:
Remove asyncpg and unnecessary deps for SQLite deployment

asyncpg requires PostgreSQL client libs which aren't available
on Render's Python runtime. Since we use SQLite, it's not needed.
Also removed test-only dependencies from production requirements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(tasks): Мобилка — dropdown уведомлений (колокольчик) не уходит за левый край

## User Request (Original)
При нажатии на колокольчик оповещений в задачах на мобилке, выпадающий блок уходит влево за экран

## Actions Taken
- На мобилке (768px) dropdown переключён на position:fixed с left:8px + right:8px
- Занимает всю ширину экрана с отступами 8px по бокам
- Десктоп не затронут

## Files Changed
- `ozon_app.py` — CSS @media 768px: #tasks-notif-dropdown position fixed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Port 4 features from Gentoo: gum backend, hybrid GPU, peripherals, shrink wizard

- lib/dialog.sh: gum TUI backend (priority gum > dialog > whiptail), phantom
  ESC detection with EPOCHREALTIME 150ms threshold, text fallback after 3 retries
- lib/hardware.sh: multi-GPU scanning with iGPU/dGPU classification, peripheral
  detection (bluetooth, fingerprint, thunderbolt, sensors, webcam, WWAN, ASUS ROG),
  multi-OS detection with serialize/deserialize
- lib/disk.sh + tui/disk_select.sh: partition shrink wizard for dual-boot
  (NTFS/ext4/btrfs), shrink helpers (disk_get_free_space_mib, disk_plan_shrink)
- lib/config.sh: validate_config() with enum checks, RFC 1123 hostname, cross-field
- tui/extra_packages.sh: conditional hardware items in checklist
- tui/gpu_config.sh: hybrid GPU display
- tui/summary.sh: validation + shrink info + enhanced dual-boot warning
- data/gum.tar.gz: bundled gum v0.17.0 static binary
- CLAUDE.md: documented all new features and CONFIG_VARS

commit.message:
TS2307 missing module stubs — Round 2 error cleanup

Created types/missing-modules.d.ts with 46 module declarations:
- 37 @/ alias modules (builder-standalone internal, root tsconfig can't resolve)
- 9 @sarge/ sub-path modules (files exist, package exports not declared)
- 6 modules with bodied type declarations (ProjectMeta, WorkbenchSlot, etc.)
- 6 @sarge/core/providers/* NOT stubbed (files genuinely missing)

Monorepo tsc errors: 418 → 297 (-121, 29% reduction)
TS2307 specifically: 132 → 7 (95% reduction)
builder-standalone: still 0 errors (strict mode clean)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(aperak): add APERAK support — 1 PID, 5 TOML mappings, 4 roundtrip tests

Add APERAK (Application Error and Acknowledgement) message type.
Message-only format (no tx_group, no UNS). Single PID (empty in AHB,
"92001" in fixture names).

Structure: BGM (312=acceptance/313=error), DTM+137, SG2 (RFF+ACE/AGO/TN),
SG3 (NAD MS/MR + optional CTA+COM), SG4 (ERC + FTX+ABO),
SG4.SG5 (RFF + FTX AAO/Z02).

5 message-level TOMLs: nachricht, referenz, marktteilnehmer, fehler,
fehler_referenz. 3 real fixtures + 1 generated, all byte-identical
(10-17 segments).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
refactor!: v2.0.0 schema with LocalizedString, catalogNumber, tags

Breaking change to preset schema:
- All name/location fields use LocalizedString ({ ja, en })
- dexNumber → catalogNumber, availability → tags
- vitamins → items, vitaminsAffectedByMultipliers → itemsAffectedByMultipliers
- database.pokemon → database.entries, database.trainers → database.groups
- Add goalValue to CounterDefinition, remove goalTemplates
- Widen multiplierStacking to include 'additive', maxPerStat nullable
- Fix Nidoran ID collision (nidoran-f / nidoran-m)
- Add @types/node, allowImportingTsExtensions
